parameters.content:
## 1. Schedule
Runs every 60 minutes and evaluates the next 24 hours of confirmed bookings.

## 2. Duplicate guard
Skips coach/client pairs that already have an unexpired AI session note. If the note exists, the workflow checks the coach notification too.

## 3. Client context
Fetches profile, completed workouts, private coach notes, and recent check-ins from Supabase.

## 4. Generate + notify
Calls Groq, saves one ai_session_notes row, then creates one coach notification with data.kind = ai_session_ready.

## 5. Run summary
Returns counts for found, generated, skipped, repaired notifications, and errors so each run is easy to inspect.

### Implementation note
The Code node intentionally keeps DB and AI work together for v1: no schema migration, no new Edge Function, and one tested place for service-role Supabase access.
